data.name: Rich Uncle: A Gay Adventure
data.detailed_description:
Life sometimes takes unexpected turns. That's what Leo, a young gay boy growing up in a remote village in Finland, must have thought when he receives a letter from an uncle unknown to him, who decides to leave him his immense fortune. But there is one condition, the boy must embark on a journey that will take him, by passing various tests, all over Europe. Will you embark on this adventure? Will you make new friends? Will you explore your sexuality? The choices are many, and they are all in your hands.

Features:

- + 13000 words
- Choose the name of the Mc
- Music and sounds effects
- Replay gallery
- Ren'Py Engine
data.about_the_game:
Life sometimes takes unexpected turns. That's what Leo, a young gay boy growing up in a remote village in Finland, must have thought when he receives a letter from an uncle unknown to him, who decides to leave him his immense fortune. But there is one condition, the boy must embark on a journey that will take him, by passing various tests, all over Europe. Will you embark on this adventure? Will you make new friends? Will you explore your sexuality? The choices are many, and they are all in your hands.

Features:

- + 13000 words
- Choose the name of the Mc
- Music and sounds effects
- Replay gallery
- Ren'Py Engine
data.short_description: Leo is a young gay man growing up in a remote village in Finland. A bizarre challenge takes him on a journey across Europe. Will he manage to come out on top? Will he make new friends? Will he explore his sexuality? The choices are many and they are all in your hands.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card with DX10 (shader model 4.0) capabilities
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
